critical.title: Unauthenticated AI access in dev/legacy mode
critical.description: When Supabase auth and org store are not configured, optionalAuth allows requests as account 'default' and allowLegacyDevAccount() permits AI generation without login.
critical.recommendation: Require authentication for all AI routes in staging/production; set SUPABASE_URL+ANON_KEY and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY; disable legacy bypass via env flag.

critical.title: KB Admin API enabled by default outside production
critical.description: kbAdminEnabled() returns true when NODE_ENV !== 'production' unless KB_ADMIN_API_ENABLED=false. Misconfigured staging could expose substance publish/admin endpoints.
critical.recommendation: Default KB_ADMIN_API_ENABLED=false; require explicit opt-in per environment.

critical.title: Dual migration systems — deployment drift risk
critical.description: Prisma migrations cover credits/patient-registry/SQLite paths; org, konsil, discuss-case, calendar, integration, demo canonical live in 20+ Supabase SQL migrations not tracked by Prisma.
critical.recommendation: Document and automate Supabase migration apply in CI/CD; add preflight check that required tables exist before server start.

major.title: Minimal automated test coverage
major.description: Only 3 test files (17 tests), all demo-patient focused. No server route, permission, or UI integration tests.
major.recommendation: Add vitest tests for org permissions, caseAiAccessGuard, demo read-only enforcement, and critical API routes.

major.title: Main JS bundle 4.38 MB — no code splitting
major.description: Vite warns single chunk >500 kB. Enterprise, konsil, KB admin, pdf tooling all in one bundle.
major.recommendation: Route-based dynamic imports for enterprise, consultation, discuss-case, templates, calendar.

major.title: /api/generate missing clinical language enforcement
major.description: Combination check, lab-med, prep AI use requireClinicalLanguage(); legacy generate route does not validate Accept-Language or body.language.
major.recommendation: Align generate route with resolveClinicalLanguage pattern used by other AI endpoints.

major.title: Audit log view permission bypass in non-production
major.description: canViewAuditLogs returns true whenever NODE_ENV !== 'production', skipping audit.view permission.
major.recommendation: Gate dev bypass behind explicit AUDIT_DEBUG=true env; never skip in staging.

major.title: Demo seed version still v2 (canonical sync ready for v3+)
major.description: DEMO_SEED_VERSION=v2 in bundled fixture. Canonical sync via /api/demo-patient/canonical supports publisher bump to v3+ but not yet published.
major.recommendation: Publish v3 canonical fixture via demo publisher before sales demos; run demo:fixture:regen + publish API.

major.title: Enterprise module largely stubbed
major.description: Enterprise routes gated by ENABLE_ENTERPRISE_ORG_HIERARCHY; SSO, departments, external consultant flows are placeholders.
major.recommendation: Treat enterprise UI as preview-only; document feature flag requirements.

major.title: DiscussCase voice requires LiveKit env
major.description: LiveKit voice panel shows config error without LIVEKIT_API_KEY, LIVEKIT_API_SECRET, LIVEKIT_URL on server.
major.recommendation: Document env vars; degrade gracefully in demo mode.

major.title: Combination check AI runs stored in-memory
major.description: pendingRuns Map is process-local; lost on restart and not shared across instances.
major.recommendation: Persist runs to Supabase or Redis for multi-instance deployments.

major.title: Integration FHIR adapter is stub
major.description: FHIR R4 mapping marked as stubs; hub UI present but full round-trip not verified.
major.recommendation: Complete FHIR mapper or hide from production nav until ready.

major.title: Konsil/DiscussCase excluded from demo fixture
major.description: Demo QA checklist marks Konsil and DiscussCase as server-side placeholders only — not sales-demo ready for those modules.
major.recommendation: Add lightweight demo fixtures or guided empty-state UX for sales walkthrough.

major.title: No ESLint / pre-commit quality gate
major.description: package.json has no lint script; dead imports and style drift not caught automatically.
major.recommendation: Add eslint + typescript-eslint with CI step.

major.title: Workspace vault falls back to deviceId without auth
major.description: Unauthenticated clients can use deviceId as owner key when regional tier allows snapshot sync.
major.recommendation: Require auth for cloud snapshot sync in production deployments.
